name: In-memory PowerShell
notes:
This rule detects loading of essential DLLs used by PowerShell, but not by the process Powershell.exe.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tom Kern, oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova, Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: In-memory PowerShell
SIGMA Description: Detects loading of essential DLL used by PowerShell, but not by the process powershell.exe. Detects meterpreter's "load powershell" extension.


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when the event matches LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'system.management.automation.dll' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'system.management.automation.ni.dll' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\dsac.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\program files\powershell\7\pwsh.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%powershell.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%powershell_ise.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\sdiagnhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%mscorsvw.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\remotefxvgpudisablement.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%sqlps.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%wsmprovhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%winrshost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%syncappvpublishingserver.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%runscripthelper.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%servermanager.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\ide\ssms.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\ide\devenv.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%servicehub.vsdetouredhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%servicehub.settingshost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%servicehub.host.clr.x86.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\citrix\configsync\configsyncrun.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\program files (x86)\microsoft visual studio\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\program files\microsoft visual studio\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY In-memory PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when the event matches LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'system.management.automation.dll' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'system.management.automation.ni.dll' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\dsac.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\program files\powershell\7\pwsh.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%powershell.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%powershell_ise.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\sdiagnhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%mscorsvw.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\remotefxvgpudisablement.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%sqlps.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%wsmprovhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%winrshost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%syncappvpublishingserver.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%runscripthelper.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%servermanager.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\ide\ssms.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\ide\devenv.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%servicehub.vsdetouredhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%servicehub.settingshost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%servicehub.host.clr.x86.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\citrix\configsync\configsyncrun.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\program files (x86)\microsoft visual studio\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\program files\microsoft visual studio\%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects loading of essential DLLs used by PowerShell, but not by the process Powershell.exe.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
